features.name: Proof Platform
features.description: Repository verification, scoring, verdicts, reports, dashboards, and PR evidence.

features.name: Project Knowledge Graph
features.description: Persistent deterministic code truth, dependencies, tests, features, routes, schemas, and freshness.

features.name: Context Compiler
features.description: Task-specific role-aware context packs bounded by a token budget.

features.name: Sandbox and Security
features.description: Isolated command execution, policy checks, dependency analysis, and secret scanning.

features.name: Agent-Assisted Safe Fix Runtime
features.description: Governed patch planning, explicit approval, atomic application, full proof comparison, and automatic rollback.

features.name: Policy Kernel and Capability Permissions
features.description: Role-scoped patch permissions, protected-path enforcement, risk flags, contract locks, and approval decisions.

features.name: State Transactions and Loop Governor
features.description: Compare-and-swap repository state, one-time approvals, bounded revisions, oscillation detection, audit logs, and safe rollback.

features.name: Command Center Web App
features.description: Local truth-compression web interface for proof, repository knowledge, risk, transactions, approvals, and evidence.

features.name: Command Center Security Boundary
features.description: Read-only defaults, localhost binding, same-origin enforcement, action tokens, security headers, and evidence containment.

features.name: Command Center Local API
features.description: Versioned local API for overview, proof, graph analysis, context, runs, approvals, verification, rollback, and evidence.

features.name: Product Brain
features.description: Converts product intent into deterministic blueprints, requirements, user flows, risks, assumptions, success criteria, and architecture hints.

features.name: Prevention-First Engineering
features.description: Locks contracts, architecture decisions, risk controls, requirement-linked tests, and contradiction checks before implementation.

features.name: Deterministic State Coordinator
features.description: Maintains monotonic project state, compare-and-swap transactions, contract locks, and stale-state rejection for factory runs.

features.name: Epoch Planner and Patch Aggregator
features.description: Builds dependency-safe execution epochs and atomically groups proposals that intersect files or shared contracts.

features.name: Heterogeneous Model Router
features.description: Routes work to the cheapest capable provider-neutral model while enforcing diverse review for high-risk tasks.

features.name: Specialist Agent Orchestrator
features.description: Coordinates accountable product, architecture, UI, frontend, backend, testing, security, review, documentation, performance, and DevOps roles.

features.name: Proof-Backed Factory Assembly
features.description: Plans, stages, builds, verifies, and atomically assembles supported alpha products only after a VERIFIED proof result.

features.name: Basalt Obsidian Design System
features.description: Locks the stealth dark Basalt visual language and audits UI code for lime, emoji, external assets, and token drift.

features.name: Private Beta Workspaces and RBAC
features.description: Persists users, teams, roles, projects, invitations, and append-only activity with capability checks.

features.name: Durable Private Beta Job Runtime
features.description: Runs persistent verify, factory, and packaging work with leases, ownership, idempotency, retries, cancellation, and events.

features.name: Private Beta Workspace Runtime
features.description: Creates bounded disposable workspaces with symlink rejection, environment allowlisting, and source immutability checks.

features.name: Secret-Safe Model Provider Registry
features.description: Inventories local and configured OpenAI-compatible providers without persisting or exposing credentials.

features.name: Verified Deployment Control Plane
features.description: Packages only VERIFIED products into immutable digest-checked artifacts with approvals, promotion, restore, and rollback records.

features.name: Private Beta Command Center
features.description: Surfaces persistent projects, durable jobs, provider status, deployments, factory runs, proof, and decisions through the secured local UI/API.

features.name: Official Basalt Brand System
features.description: Integrates the founder-provided monochrome wordmark and compact marks into the Basalt Obsidian Command Center.

features.name: Expanded Private Beta Product Templates
features.description: Adds API service, web app, and proof-backed SaaS starter generation with tenancy, roles, and subscription gates.
